_meta.note: Config names are UI display names only. Backend setting names are intentionally excluded.

delay.description: How long the behavior must continue before the first alert sounds.
delay.custom_description: Set how long the system waits before sending an alert.

immediate.label: Immediate
immediate.warning: Alerts may trigger too quickly. May cause false positives.

default.label: Default
default.description: Balanced response time and event creation.

delayed.label: Delayed
delayed.warning: Alerts will trigger later, reducing event count and responsiveness.

repeat_delay.description: How long to wait before repeating an alert if the behavior continues.
repeat_delay.custom_description: Set how long to wait before repeating an alert.

frequent.label: Frequent
frequent.warning: Alerts repeat quickly — increases driver responsiveness but may feel disruptive.

default.label: Default
default.description: Balanced repeat frequency for ongoing behaviors.

delayed.label: Delayed
delayed.warning: Alerts repeat less often; may reduce effectiveness of alerts.

mute_time.description: Time after an alert when new alerts are temporarily paused.
mute_time.custom_description: Set how long alerts stay muted after the last one.

short_mute.label: Short Mute
short_mute.warning: Short mute interval — allows faster re-alerts, increasing responsiveness but possibly over-alerting.

long_mute.label: Long Mute
long_mute.warning: Long mute may suppress valid alerts, reducing detection accuracy.

max_repeats.description: How many times the system repeats an alert before stopping.
max_repeats.custom_description: Set how many times alerts can repeat before stopping.

quick.label: Quick
quick.warning: Event may be created after very few alerts; high event volume risk.

default.label: Default
default.description: Balanced repeat count for stable event creation.

high.label: High
high.warning: Requires multiple repeats; may lower event volume.

min_speed.description: The minimum speed required before alerts can trigger.
min_speed.custom_description: Set the minimum vehicle speed required to trigger alerts.

preset_warnings.low: Alerts may trigger while vehicle is stationary.
preset_warnings.high: Alerts will not trigger at lower speeds; risk of missing in-traffic events.

confidence.description: Confidence level required before an alert is triggered.

preset_warnings.sensitive: Lower confidence threshold; more alerts, higher false positives.
preset_warnings.strict: Higher confidence threshold; fewer alerts, risk of missed events.

alert_threshold.description: Number of alerts of a given risk type that must be activated before event creation is triggered.

quick_trigger.label: Quick Trigger
quick_trigger.warning: Events created too quickly; may flood reporting.

delayed_trigger.label: Delayed Trigger
delayed_trigger.warning: Higher threshold; fewer events created, possible underreporting.

event_detection_window.description: The rolling time period in which the specified number of alerts must occur before event creation is triggered.

quick.label: Quick
quick.warning: Events created very quickly; risk of high volume.

default.label: Default
default.description: Balanced event window for normal fleet operations.

extended.label: Extended
extended.warning: Events may not trigger unless alerts spread across a longer time; fewer events.

event_detection_window.guardrail_note: Must verify that alert settings (Delay, Max Repeats, Repeat Delay) do not prevent event creation.

event_snooze_duration.description: The snooze period after an event is created before another event can be created for the same behavior.

short.label: Short
short.warning: Frequent events; possible driver fatigue and alert overload.

default.label: Default
default.description: Balanced snooze; prevents duplicates while capturing risk.

extended.label: Extended
extended.warning: Events suppressed for long periods; risk of missing repeated behaviors.

delay_vs_event_window.error_message: Delay cannot exceed Event Detection Window. No events would be generated in this setup.

event_creation_feasibility.rule: (Max Repeats × Repeat Delay) + Delay ≤ Event Detection Window
event_creation_feasibility.error_message: Max Repeats and Delay together must fit within Event Detection Window. Current setup would prevent event creation.

threshold_stats.description: Alert Threshold outcomes across 847 fleets — 90-day window
threshold_stats.insight: 67% of fleets that set Alert Threshold=2 (Quick Trigger) reverted within 14 days due to coaching queue overload.

alert_config_stats.description: In-cab alert combination effectiveness — self-correction rates

neither.label: No alerts
neither.warning: Disabling both Audio and LED alerts causes event generation to stop entirely.

alert_config_stats.insight: Disabling both Audio and LED alerts causes event generation to stop entirely.

group_move_stats.insight: Only 31% of admins realise a group move triggers 18 downstream service notifications.

group_delete_stats.recommended_action: Reassign all safety events to the parent group before deleting.
group_delete_stats.insight: 66% of fleets that deleted a group without reassignment lost safety event history.

behavior_enrollment_stats.rolldown_trigger: Adding a parent group applies the behavior to ALL child groups automatically.
behavior_enrollment_stats.remove_warning: Removing one group from a shared workflow removes the behavior for ALL groups on that workflow.
behavior_enrollment_stats.insight: 89% of admins were unaware their behavior add/remove cascaded to other groups.
